WindowsAudioWrapper
Table of Contents

Interface IWindowsAudioController

Namespace
WindowsAudioWrapper
Assembly
WindowsAudioWrapper.dll

Public entry point for reading and applying Windows audio profiles.

public interface IWindowsAudioController : IDisposable
Inherited Members
IDisposable.Dispose()

Methods

ApplyProfile(AudioProfile) 

AudioProfileApplyResult ApplyProfile(AudioProfile profile)

Parameters

profile AudioProfile

Returns

AudioProfileApplyResult

GetCurrentProfile()

Captures every setting WindowsAudioWrapper can currently read into a normal AudioProfile. The returned profile can be saved, edited, or applied later.

AudioProfile GetCurrentProfile()

Returns

AudioProfile

AudioEndpointInfo GetDefaultCommunicationsPlaybackDevice()

Returns

AudioEndpointInfo

GetPlaybackDevices(AudioDeviceState) 

IReadOnlyList<AudioEndpointInfo> GetPlaybackDevices(AudioDeviceState states = AudioDeviceState.Active | AudioDeviceState.Unplugged)

Parameters

states AudioDeviceState

Returns

IReadOnlyList<AudioEndpointInfo>

GetRecordingDevices(AudioDeviceState) 

IReadOnlyList<AudioEndpointInfo> GetRecordingDevices(AudioDeviceState states = AudioDeviceState.Active | AudioDeviceState.Unplugged)

Parameters

states AudioDeviceState

Returns

IReadOnlyList<AudioEndpointInfo>

RegisterTargetDevice(AudioEndpointReference)

Registers a targeted device reference to explicitly monitor for custom connection arrivals. When matched, the AudioDeviceConnected event fires.

void RegisterTargetDevice(AudioEndpointReference device)

Parameters

device AudioEndpointReference

The reference criteria mapping the target hardware to track.

UnregisterTargetDevice(AudioEndpointReference)

Unregisters a previously tracked device reference from arrival notification callback monitoring.

void UnregisterTargetDevice(AudioEndpointReference device)

Parameters

device AudioEndpointReference

The reference criteria mapping the target hardware to remove.

ValidateProfile(AudioProfile) 

AudioProfileValidationResult ValidateProfile(AudioProfile profile)

Parameters

profile AudioProfile

Returns

AudioProfileValidationResult

WaitForAudioDeviceToAppear(AudioEndpointReference, int)

Synchronously blocks execution until a matching audio endpoint becomes visible and active to the OS, or the specified timeout duration is reached.

bool WaitForAudioDeviceToAppear(AudioEndpointReference device, int timeoutMilliseconds)

Parameters

device AudioEndpointReference

The search criteria target containing target identifiers (DeviceId, ContainerId, etc.).

timeoutMilliseconds int

The maximum block window length in milliseconds.

Returns

bool

True if the matching hardware device arrives before the timeout expires; otherwise, false.

WaitForAudioDeviceToAppearAsync(AudioEndpointReference, int, CancellationToken)

Asynchronously monitors system hardware notifications until a matching audio endpoint becomes visible and active.

Task<bool> WaitForAudioDeviceToAppearAsync(AudioEndpointReference device, int timeoutMilliseconds, CancellationToken cancellationToken = default)

Parameters

device AudioEndpointReference

The search criteria target containing target identifiers (DeviceId, ContainerId, etc.).

timeoutMilliseconds int

The maximum wait duration length in milliseconds.

cancellationToken CancellationToken

An optional token to cooperatively cancel the asynchronous monitoring task.

Returns

Task<bool>

A task containing true if the hardware becomes active before the timeout; otherwise, false.

Events

AnyAudioDeviceConnected

Fires globally whenever any audio endpoint is plugged in, discovered, or becomes active in the system configuration.

event EventHandler<AudioDeviceEventArgs>? AnyAudioDeviceConnected

Event Type

EventHandler<AudioDeviceEventArgs>

AudioDeviceConnected

Fires when a specifically registered or targeted audio device connects and becomes active.

event EventHandler<AudioDeviceEventArgs>? AudioDeviceConnected

Event Type

EventHandler<AudioDeviceEventArgs>
